uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

isPro.description: Whether the user has a Pro subscription.

credits.description: The number of in-app credits the user has.

styleProfile.description: The analyzed style DNA of the user.

lastAnalyzedAt.description: When the style was last analyzed.

Artwork.title: Artwork
Artwork.description: Represents an uploaded artwork for style training.

id.description: The unique ID of the artwork.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this artwork.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the artwork image.

id.description: The unique ID of the generation.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this generation.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the generated image.

referenceImage.description: The reference image URL if used.

id.description: The unique ID of the template.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this template.

CommunityPost.title: Community Post
CommunityPost.description: Represents a shared generation in the community feed.

id.description: The unique ID of the post.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this post.

authorName.description: The display name of the author.

authorPhoto.description: The URL of the author's profile photo.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the generated image.

styleProfile.description: The style profile used for generation.

likesCount.description: The number of likes this post has received.

isRemixable.description: Whether others can remix this post using its DNA.

remixCount.description: The number of times this post has been remixed.

StyleBattle.title: Style Battle
StyleBattle.description: A real-time competition between two DNA styles.

id.description: The unique ID of the battle.

prompt.description: The global prompt for the battle.

Tribe.title: DNA Tribe
Tribe.description: A collaborative group sharing a collective Style DNA.

id.description: The unique ID of the tribe.

masterDNA.description: The mathematical blend of all members' DNA.

memberCount.description: The number of members in the tribe.

MarketplaceListing.title: Marketplace Listing
MarketplaceListing.description: A Style DNA listed for rent/sale.

id.description: The unique ID of the listing.

salesCount.description: The number of times this DNA has been rented.

Library.title: Style Library
Library.description: Stores a collection of style image URLs and analyzed DNA for a user.

styleImages.description: List of URLs for style images.

status.description: The status of the style analysis.

updatedAt.description: When the library was last updated.

UserMemory.title: User Memory
UserMemory.description: Stores user preferences and interaction history for personalized AI responses.

lastProjectContext.description: Context from the last active project.

interactionsCount.description: Number of interactions with the AI.

lastUsedPersona.description: The last persona used by the user.

/users/{userId}/artworks/{artworkId}.description: Collection of artworks for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/generations/{generationI.description: Collection of generated images for a specific user.

/users/{userId}/templates/{templateId}.description: Collection of saved prompt templates for a specific user.

/style_battles/{battleId}.description: Collection of active and past style battles.

/users/{userId}/memory/{memoryId}.description: Collection of user memory documents for personalization.
